Bash(curl -s 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/holtzy/D3-graph-gallery/master/DATA/world.geojson' | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
names = [f['properties'].get\('name','?'\) for f in data['features']]
# Check which PINNED names match
pinned = ['USA','Canada','Mexico','Costa Rica','Cuba','Brazil','Argentina','Colombia','Peru','Chile','Ecuador','Venezuela','Bolivia','Uruguay','France','England','Spain','Italy','Germany','Greece','Portugal','Turkey','Norway','Croatia','Switzerland','Egypt','South Africa','Morocco','Kenya','Nigeria','Ghana','Ethiopia','Madagascar','Senegal','Algeria','Mozambique','Cameroon','Uganda','Japan','Thailand','India','China','South Korea','Indonesia','Australia','Vietnam','Philippines','New Zealand']
for p in pinned:
    if p not in names:
        # find similar
        similar = [n for n in names if p.lower\(\) in n.lower\(\) or any\(w in n.lower\(\) for w in p.lower\(\).split\(\)\)]
        print\(f'MISSING: {p} -> similar: {similar}'\)
")
